subject: Two humanoid figures in close combat context: one in the left foreground being engulfed by a crackling red-orange magical explosion, the other recoiling in horror on the right in purple robes
description: Two figures fill a dark, close-quarters frame. The figure on the left stands in partial profile, arms flung outward, body being consumed by a violent burst of crimson and orange energy that radiates from their torso — a shattering, explosive effect with tendrils of red magic. Their expression is obscured by the burst. The figure on the right, in purple-dark robes and ornate shoulder armor, recoils with eyes wide and mouth open in shock, hands raised slightly in a defensive or surprised gesture. The background is a muted teal-grey darkness. The palette is dominated by the crimson explosion against deep shadow and purple fabric.
foreground: Figure engulfed in crimson magical explosion, arms spread
background: Figure in purple robes recoiling in horror, dark teal backdrop
emotion: anguish and dissolution from the left figure; shock and horror from the right
